data.title: Centene and Oscar Health stocks decrease after Molina Healthcare reports lower annual guidance, with Molina's Q3 earnings at $1.84/share, down from $6.01 last year, and MCR rising to 92.6%. Marketplaces MCR at 95.6%. Molina Healthcare predicts fiscal 2025 adjusted earnings in low $20s.
data.description: Two U.S. healthcare insurance providers, Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC) and Oscar Health Inc. (NYSE: OSCR), are experiencing a decline in their stock prices following Molina Healthcare Inc.'s (NYSE: MOH) announcement of disappointing annual guidance. Centene reported third-quarter adjusted earnings of $1.84 per share, down from $6.01 per share in the same quarter last year, falling short of the expected $3.90 per share. The consolidated medical care ratio (MCR) for the third quarter of 2025 increased to 92.6%, compared to 89.2% a year ago. The Medicaid MCR stood at 92.0%, Medicare at 93.6%, and Marketplace at 95.6%. Molina Healthcare's shares fell more than 19% in after-hours trading. Molina Healthcare anticipates adjusted earnings for fiscal 2025...

data.title: NYCWFF 2025: 35,000+ guests at Seaport for 5 days of food, drink, and celebrities featuring 300+ chefs and personalities.
data.description: In New York City, the 18th annual Food Network New York City Wine & Food Festival presented by Invesco QQQ attracted over 35,000 attendees, including food enthusiasts, chefs, and mixologists, from October 15–19. The event took place at the Invesco QQQ Festival Campus in the historic Seaport area, featuring over 300 chefs and culinary personalities. The festival spanned five days and included signature events, interactive tastings, and intimate dinners.

data.title: Deadline approaching for investors in Quanex Building Products to discuss losses between Dec 12, 2024 and Sep 5, 2025. Contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is inviting investors who experienced losses in Quanex to connect with him regarding potential options. If you bought or obtained securities in Quanex within the period of December 12, 2024, to September 5, 2025, and are interested in discussing this matter further, please reach out to Wilson directly.

data.title: Kauai Sea Tours debuts luxury 65ft catamaran Lady Kailani for Nā Pali Coast adventures, redefining Hawaii vacays.
data.description: A luxurious 65-foot custom-built catamaran offers a range of amenities perfect for enjoying the ocean, making it a must-have experience for any dream vacation in Hawaii. The vessel is operated by Kauai Sea Tours, the longest-standing family-owned boat tour company on the island, boasting a legacy of almost four decades and spanning three generations. Visit KAUAI, Hawaii on October 23, 2025 for an unforgettable experience aboard this top-tier catamaran.
TRUMP TO MEET WITH XI JINPING NEXT THURSDAY

data.title: Investors of Molina Healthcare can contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP by Sept 28 if losses occurred between Feb 5, 2025 and July 23, 2025.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is reaching out to investors who have incurred losses in Molina. If you bought or obtained Molina securities from February 5, 2025, to July 23, 2025, and wish to explore your options, Wilson suggests contacting him directly. Feel free to reach out if you are one of the affected investors during this period.

data.title: Senate Democrats blocked a bill to pay essential government employees, as Republicans blocked Democratic bills to pay more workers amid shutdown.
data.description: A proposal by Republicans to provide salary for vital government workers faced opposition in the Senate, resulting in a deadlock. Additionally, Republicans prevented the passing of two Democratic bills aimed at compensating a larger number of employees.

data.title: Investors in aTyr Pharma may be eligible for compensation if suffered losses between Jan 16, 2025 and Sep 12, 2025 - contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who experienced losses in aTyr to reach out to him directly to explore their potential courses of action. If you bought or obtained securities in aTyr during the period of January 16, 2025, to September 12, 2025, and are interested in discussing further, please contact him.

data.title: SkinCare MT partners with Forefront Dermatology through PGP in 2025, 20th such transaction since 2018, amplifying dermatologic care in Mountain West region. Key partnership in healthcare investments.
data.description: Physician Growth Partners (PGP) recently completed its 20th dermatology transaction since 2018, showcasing its strong presence as the top advisor for independent dermatologists seeking strategic partnerships. This achievement highlights PGP's expertise in facilitating these deals. The transactions have solidified PGP's reputation in the healthcare investment sector, particularly in dermatology. This Chicago-based company continues to lead the way in guiding independent dermatologists through various strategic partnership opportunities.

data.title: Waldom Electronics announces 2024 ESG Award winners at annual dinner, recognizing sustainability efforts in industry.
data.description: In Rockford, Illinois, Waldom Electronics revealed the recipients of the 2024 ESG Awards at the Waldom Dinner prior to the ECIA Executive Conference. This award program, unique in the Interconnect, Passive, and Electromechanical distribution sector, acknowledges supplier and distributor allies who exhibit remarkable dedication to sustainability, environmental responsibility, and social governance. This year's winners exemplify outstanding contributions to these values in the industry.

data.title: Investors of Semler Scientific between March 10, 2021 and April 15, 2025 who suffered losses are urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP before the approaching deadline. Contact James Wilson for discussion.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Semler Scientific to reach out to him for a consultation regarding their potential options. If you bought or obtained securities in Semler Scientific during the period of March 10, 2021, to April 15, 2025, and suffered losses, please contact Mr. Wilson immediately.

data.title: U.S. initiating probe into China's adherence to 2020 trade pact, escalating tensions before leaders' summit. #trade #USChina #investigation
data.description: The current administration led by Trump is getting ready to launch a trade inquiry into China's adherence to a trade agreement signed in 2020. This move has the potential to escalate tensions leading up to a summit between the leaders of both countries.

data.title: Investors of Jasper between Nov 30, 2023-July 3, 2025, facing losses advised to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for options.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a partner specializing in securities litigation at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Jasper to reach out to him directly. If you bought or obtained securities in Jasper within the period from November 30, 2023, to July 3, 2025, and wish to explore your options, Wilson is available for consultations. It is advised to contact him promptly to discuss the matter further.

data.title: Peoples Ltd. reports Q3 2025 net income of $3,012,000. CEO announces results for the holding company of PS Bank.
data.description: In Wyalusing, Pennsylvania on October 23, 2025, Peoples Ltd. (OTC: PPLL) reported their third quarter 2025 results. Anthony J. Gabello, President and CEO of Peoples Ltd., the holding company for PS Bank, disclosed a net income of $3,012,000 for the quarter.
